topics.title: Systems Architecture
topics.description: CPU and Von Neumann architecture, memory and storage, wired/wireless networks, topologies and protocols, cyber security, ethics, digital currencies, emerging technologies, input/output devices, and software.

topics.title: Algorithms, Programming and Logic
topics.description: Computational thinking, searching and sorting algorithms, programming constructs and data types, maintainable programs and arrays, logic gates and Boolean expressions, the program development life cycle, and single-table databases with SQL.

topics.title: Data Representation
topics.description: Translators and languages, compression and units of data, denary/binary/hexadecimal number systems, two's complement, character/sound/image representation, data transmission methods, and error detection.
